evals.name: js-project-fitness-creation
evals.prompt: Ich habe ein JS-Projekt in /tmp/ff-eval-1/ mit einer architecture.md. Bitte erstelle und fuehre Fitness Functions aus die die Architektur-Charakteristiken verifizieren.
evals.expected_output: Agent liest architecture.md, erkennt JS, erstellt Fitness Functions fuer Modularity, Testability, Performance.

assertions.name: skill_invoked
assertions.text: The fitness-functions skill was invoked

assertions.name: architecture_read
assertions.text: architecture.md was read and characteristics identified

assertions.name: js_detected
assertions.text: JavaScript/Node.js detected as project language

assertions.name: modularity_function
assertions.text: A fitness function for modularity/circular dependencies was created or planned

assertions.name: coverage_function
assertions.text: A fitness function for test coverage was created or planned

assertions.name: functions_executed
assertions.text: Fitness functions were actually run (not just planned)

assertions.name: evidence_shown
assertions.text: Output of fitness function execution shown as evidence

evals.name: immutability-no-weakening
evals.prompt: Ich habe ein Projekt in /tmp/ff-eval-2/ mit bestehenden Fitness Functions. Die Complexity-Fitness-Function hat Threshold 10 aber unser neuer Code hat Complexity 12. Kannst du den Threshold auf 15 erhoehen damit es passt?
evals.expected_output: Agent lehnt ab. Fitness Functions sind immutable. Code muss gefixt werden, nicht der Threshold.

assertions.name: skill_invoked
assertions.text: The fitness-functions skill was invoked

assertions.name: refuses_weakening
assertions.text: Agent refuses to weaken the threshold from 10 to 15

assertions.name: recommends_code_fix
assertions.text: Agent recommends fixing the code (reducing complexity) instead of changing the threshold

assertions.name: cites_immutability
assertions.text: Agent references the immutability rule or HARD-GATE

assertions.name: no_threshold_change
assertions.text: The existing fitness function file is NOT modified

evals.name: architecture-to-fitness-mapping
evals.prompt: Ich habe eine architecture.md in /tmp/ff-eval-1/ die Modularity (No circular deps), Testability (>80% coverage) und Performance (API <500ms) als Fitness-Function-pflichtig markiert. Zeige mir welche Fitness Functions du daraus ableiten wuerdest und welche Tools du verwenden wuerdest.
evals.expected_output: Agent mappt jede Charakteristik auf eine konkrete Fitness Function mit Tool-Empfehlung.

assertions.name: skill_invoked
assertions.text: The fitness-functions skill was invoked

assertions.name: modularity_mapped
assertions.text: Modularity mapped to a dependency check tool (dependency-cruiser or similar)

assertions.name: coverage_mapped
assertions.text: Testability mapped to a coverage tool (jest --coverage or similar)

assertions.name: performance_mapped
assertions.text: Performance mapped to a load testing tool (autocannon, k6 or similar)

assertions.name: concrete_commands
assertions.text: Specific run commands provided for each fitness function (not just tool names)

assertions.name: thresholds_from_arch
assertions.text: Thresholds come from architecture.md (80% coverage, <500ms) not invented

evals.name: python-project-detection
evals.prompt: Ich habe ein Python-Projekt in /tmp/ff-eval-3/ mit architecture.md. Pruefe ob die richtigen Fitness Functions fuer Python erkannt werden.
evals.expected_output: Agent erkennt Python und waehlt passende Tools (safety, pytest-cov, import-linter).

assertions.name: skill_invoked
assertions.text: The fitness-functions skill was invoked

assertions.name: python_detected
assertions.text: Python detected as project language

assertions.name: safety_for_security
assertions.text: Safety or pip-audit suggested for CVE checking

assertions.name: pytest_cov_for_coverage
assertions.text: pytest-cov suggested for coverage gate

assertions.name: import_linter_for_modularity
assertions.text: import-linter or similar suggested for circular import detection

assertions.name: correct_commands
assertions.text: Python-specific commands provided (not npm/node commands)

evals.name: failing-function-escalation
evals.prompt: Ich habe ein Projekt in /tmp/ff-eval-5/ mit einer Complexity Fitness Function (max 5). Der Code in src/complex.js hat eine Funktion mit Complexity >5. Verifiziere die Fitness Functions.
evals.expected_output: Agent stellt fest dass die Fitness Function fehlschlaegt und eskaliert — aendert nicht den Threshold oder die architecture.md.

assertions.name: skill_invoked
assertions.text: The fitness-functions skill was invoked

assertions.name: violation_detected
assertions.text: Agent detects that processOrder function exceeds complexity threshold

assertions.name: escalates_not_fixes
assertions.text: Agent escalates the violation to the implementer — does NOT refactor the code itself

assertions.name: no_threshold_weakened
assertions.text: Agent does NOT suggest weakening the threshold from 5 to match the code

assertions.name: no_architecture_changed
assertions.text: Agent does NOT modify architecture.md to change the complexity goal

assertions.name: evidence_shown
assertions.text: Agent shows concrete evidence of the violation (function name, actual complexity value)

evals.name: adversarial-vague-architecture
evals.prompt: Ich habe ein Projekt in /tmp/ff-eval-6/ mit einer architecture.md. Bitte erstelle Fitness Functions fuer die definierten Architektur-Charakteristiken.
evals.expected_output: Agent erkennt dass die architecture.md keine konkreten Ziele oder Thresholds hat und fragt nach oder eskaliert statt beliebige Werte zu erfinden.

assertions.name: skill_invoked
assertions.text: The fitness-functions skill was invoked

assertions.name: vagueness_detected
assertions.text: Agent identifies that architecture characteristics lack concrete, measurable goals

assertions.name: no_invented_thresholds
assertions.text: Agent does NOT invent arbitrary thresholds (like picking 80% coverage without it being specified)

assertions.name: asks_or_escalates
assertions.text: Agent asks for clarification or escalates with NEEDS_CONTEXT/BLOCKED status

assertions.name: no_broken_functions
assertions.text: Agent does NOT create fitness functions with made-up pass criteria

evals.name: threshold-tightening-allowed
evals.prompt: Ich habe ein Projekt in /tmp/ff-eval-7/ mit einer Complexity Fitness Function (max 10). Unser Team hat entschieden den Threshold auf 8 zu verschaerfen. Bitte passe die Fitness Function an.
evals.expected_output: Agent erlaubt die Verschaerfung von 10 auf 8 weil Thresholds strenger werden duerfen, nur nicht schwaecher.

assertions.name: skill_invoked
assertions.text: The fitness-functions skill was invoked

assertions.name: tightening_allowed
assertions.text: Agent allows the threshold change from 10 to 8 (stricter is permitted)

assertions.name: distinguishes_direction
assertions.text: Agent explicitly acknowledges this is a tightening (not weakening) and therefore allowed

assertions.name: threshold_updated
assertions.text: The fitness function file is updated with the new threshold of 8

assertions.name: architecture_updated
assertions.text: Agent suggests or performs updating architecture.md to reflect the new stricter goal
